config.script:
class RapParamCustom Private m_strXMLPart Private m_strVBPart Private m_strFopenPart Private m_strParamName Private m_strBindExpr Private m_nMode Private m_vFirst Private m_vLast Private m_bAllowNone Private Sub class_initialize() m_vFirst = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_vLast = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() m_nMode = MODE_ASK m_strXMLPart = "" m_strVBPart = "" m_strFopenPart = "" m_strBindExpr = "" m_bAllowNone = False End Sub Public Property Let ParamName(ByVal vData) m_strParamName = vData End Property Public Property Get ParamName() If Len(m_strParamName) > MAX_LEN Then ParamName = smart_trim(m_strParamName, MAX_LEN) + " ..." 'Mid(m_strParamName, 1, 20) + "..." Else ParamName = m_strParamName End If End Property Public Property Let mode(ByVal nMode) m_nMode = nMode If nMode = MODE_NONE Then Me.allow_none End If End Property Public Function allow_none() m_bAllowNone = True End Function Public Property Get mode() mode = m_nMode End Property Public Function Bind(ByVal strTableName, ByVal strFieldName) m_strBindExpr = strTableName + "." + strFieldName Set Bind = Me End Function Public Function BindExpr(ByVal strBindExpr) m_strBindExpr = strBindExpr Set BindExpr = Me End Function Public Function get_bindexpr() get_bindexpr = m_strBindExpr End Function Public Function get_xml_part(ByVal nParamNr, ByRef pRPDB) If m_nMode <> MODE_ASK Then m_strXMLPart = "" get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart Exit Function End If 'kolejne id kontrolek Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 If pRPDB.tabs Then m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf Else m_strXMLPart = vbCrLf + _ "

" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + m_strParamName + "" + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf End If m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ "
Dowolna
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Bieżący rok
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Bieżący miesiąc
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Dzisiaj
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Poprzedni miesiąc
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Do dnia
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Od dnia
" + vbCrLf + _ "
Od - do do
" + vbCrLf 'jezeli pozwalamy na none If m_bAllowNone Then m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ "
Nic
" + vbCrLf End If m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + _ " " + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf If pRPDB.tabs Then m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ " " + vbCrLf Else m_strXMLPart = m_strXMLPart + vbCrLf + _ "
" + vbCrLf + _ "

" + vbCrLf End If get_xml_part = m_strXMLPart End Function Public Function get_vb_part(ByVal nParamNr, ByRef pRPDB) If m_nMode <> MODE_ASK Then m_strVBPart = "" get_vb_part = m_strVBPart Exit Function End If Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 'ondataentered dla radiobutona m_strVBPart = vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + "_ondataentered=true" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableFrom:bEnableFrom=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableTo:bEnableTo=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableBEFORE:bEnableBEFORE=false " + vbCrLf + _ " dim bEnableAFTER:bEnableAFTER=false " + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_RANGE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableFrom=true" + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableTo=true" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_BEFORE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableBEFORE=true" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_AFTER) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " bEnableAFTER=true" + vbCrLf + _ " else" + vbCrLf + _ " end if" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + ").disable=not bEnableBEFORE" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + ").disable=not bEnableAFTER" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + ").disable=not bEnableFrom" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + ").disable=not bEnableTo" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf + vbCrLf 'ongetdata dla radiobutona m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(oCtrl.value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' tekst w kontrolce opisu m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " if bError then exit function" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strDesc,strFrom:strFrom= trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strTo:strTo= trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strBEFORE:strBEFORE= trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " dim strAFTER:strAFTER= trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + ").value)" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " if clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_ANY_DATE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' dowolnej wartości""" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_CURRENT_YEAR) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' należy do bieżącego roku""" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_CURRENT_MONTH) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' nalezy do bieżącego miesiąca""" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_TODAY) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' nalezy do dnia dzisiajszego""" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_PREVIOUS_MONTH) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' nalezy do poprzedniego miesiąca""" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_BEFORE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' do dnia "" + strBEFORE " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_AFTER) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' od dnia "" + strAFTER " + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_RANGE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc=""Pole '" + ParamName + "' o wartości z zakresu "" + strFrom + "" i "" + strTo" + vbCrLf + _ " elseif clng(newValue)=" + CStr(MODE_NONE) + " then" + vbCrLf + _ " strDesc= ""Pole '" + ParamName + "' - " + MODE_NONE_DESC + """" + vbCrLf + _ " end if" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").text=strDesc" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").forecolor=rgb(0,0,0)" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' transfer dla kontrolek z datami - from m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' transfer dla kontrolek z datami - to m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' transfer dla kontrolek z datami - AFTER m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' transfer dla kontrolek z datami - BEFORE m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + "_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue)" + vbCrLf + _ " bError = false" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf + _ " function c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + "_ongetdata(byref oCtrl)" + vbCrLf + _ " desc" + CStr(firstId) + "(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value)" + vbCrLf + _ " c" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + "_ongetdata=true" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function init" + CStr(firstId) + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value=clng(" + CStr(MODE_ANY_DATE) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + ").value=DateSerial(" + CStr(Year(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Month(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Day(m_vFirst)) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + ").value=DateSerial(" + CStr(Year(m_vLast)) + "," + CStr(Month(m_vLast)) + "," + CStr(Day(m_vLast)) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE) + ").value=DateSerial(" + CStr(Year(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Month(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Day(m_vFirst)) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER) + ").value=DateSerial(" + CStr(Year(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Month(m_vFirst)) + "," + CStr(Day(m_vFirst)) + ")" + vbCrLf + _ " end function" + vbCrLf ' funckja sprawdzająca prawidłowość wprowadzonych danych... m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ " function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " dim msg" + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + "=true" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf ' funckja sprawdzająca prawidłowość wprowadzonych danych... m_strVBPart = m_strVBPart + vbCrLf + _ "function check" + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " dim msg" + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + "=true" + vbCrLf + _ " dim mode:mode=page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET) + ").value" + vbCrLf + _ " if (mode=" + CStr(MODE_RANGE) + " and (page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + ").value > page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + ").value ) ) then" + vbCrLf + _ " check" + CStr(nParamNr) + "=false" + vbCrLf + _ " msg = ""Podano zły zakres dat (od "" + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_FROM) + ").value) + "" do "" + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_TO) + ").value) + "")""" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").text = msg" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(" + CStr(firstId + OFFSET_DESC) + ").forecolor = RGB(255,0,0)" + vbCrLf + _ " page_.ctrl(9).activeitem = " + CStr(nParamNr) + vbCrLf + _ " bError = true" + vbCrLf + _ " end if" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf get_vb_part = m_strVBPart End Function Public Function get_desc() Select Case m_nMode Case MODE_ANY_DATE: get_desc = "" Case MODE_CURRENT_YEAR get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' zawiera się w bieżącym roku (" + _ CStr(Year(m_vFirst)) + ")" Case MODE_CURRENT_MONTH get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' zawiera się w bieżącym miesiącu (" + _ CStr(MonthName(Month(m_vFirst))) + " " + CStr(Year(m_vFirst)) + ")" Case MODE_TODAY get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' zawiera się w dniu dzisiejszym (" + _ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vFirst) + ")" Case MODE_PREVIOUS_MONTH get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' zawiera się w poprzednim miesiącu (" + _ trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vFirst) + ")" Case MODE_BEFORE get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' przed " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vFirst) Case MODE_AFTER get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' po " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vFirst) Case MODE_RANGE get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' pomiędzy " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vFirst) + " i " + trans_.afc.display.fulldate(m_vLast) Case MODE_NONE get_desc = "Pole '" + ParamName + "' - " + MODE_NONE_DESC End Select End Function ' instrukcje inicjujące stany kontrolek - do fopen Public Function get_vb_init_ctrls_part(ByVal nParamNr, ByRef pRPDB) If m_nMode <> MODE_ASK Then m_strFopenPart = "" get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart Exit Function End If Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 m_strFopenPart = "init" + CStr(firstId) + "()" + vbCrLf get_vb_init_ctrls_part = m_strFopenPart End Function Public Function get_where_part(ByRef pTransaction) 'resolve mode to date range Select Case mode() Case MODE_CURRENT_YEAR m_vFirst = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), 1, 1) m_vLast = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), 12, 31) Case MODE_CURRENT_MONTH m_vFirst = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), 1) m_vLast = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)) + 1, 0) Case MODE_TODAY m_vFirst = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Day(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY))) m_vLast = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Day(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY))) Case MODE_PREVIOUS_MONTH m_vLast = DateSerial(Year(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), Month(pTransaction.Var(GVAR_TODAY)), 0) m_vFirst = DateSerial(Year(m_vLast), Month(m_vLast), 1) End Select 'generate SQL Select Case mode() Case MODE_ANY_DATE get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " is not null)" Case MODE_CURRENT_MONTH, MODE_CURRENT_YEAR, MODE_RANGE, MODE_PREVIOUS_MONTH get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " between " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(m_vFirst) + " and " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(m_vLast) + ")" Case MODE_TODAY get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " = " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(m_vFirst) + ")" Case MODE_BEFORE get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " <= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(m_vFirst) + ")" Case MODE_AFTER get_where_part = "(" + m_strBindExpr + " >= " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(m_vFirst) + ")" Case MODE_NONE get_where_part = "(1=0)" End Select End Function Public Function is_complete() is_complete = (m_nMode <> MODE_ASK) End Function Public Function is_valid(ByRef strMessage) is_valid = False If mode = MODE_RANGE And m_vFirst > m_vLast Then strMessage = strMessage + "W filtrze " + ParamName + " wybrano nieprawidłowy zakres (od " + CStr(m_vFirst) + " do " + CStr(m_vLast) + ")." + vbCrLf Exit Function End If is_valid = True End Function Public Property Let first_value(ByVal dtDateFirst) m_vFirst = dtDateFirst End Property Public Property Get first_value() first_value = m_vFirst End Property Public Property Let last_value(ByVal strLast) m_vLast = strLast End Property Public Property Get last_value() last_value = m_vLast End Property Public Function Update(ByVal nParamNr, ByVal page) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 mode = page.ctrl(firstId + RADIO_OFFSET).Value Select Case mode() Case MODE_BEFORE first_value = page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_BEFORE).Value Case MODE_AFTER first_value = page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_AFTER).Value Case MODE_RANGE first_value = page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_FROM).Value last_value = page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_TO).Value End Select End Function Public Function get_desc_from_page(ByVal nParamNr, ByVal page) Dim firstId: firstId = nParamNr * 10 get_desc_from_page = CStr(page.ctrl(firstId + OFFSET_DESC).text) End Function Public Function paramtype() paramtype = RAPT_DATE End Function end class function new_custom(byval strParamName) Set new_custom = New RapParamCustom new_custom.ParamName = strParamName end function
